name: card-skill
description: Render text content into polished, shareable PNG cards, posters, whiteboards, long-form reading cards, editorial images, and in-article diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Turn text into publish-ready visual cards
interface.longDescription: card-skill packages Quiet Paper renderers, templates, fonts, schemas, and output checks for turning articles, notes, arguments, stories, and explicitly requested WeChat Reading highlights or statistics into polished PNG visuals.
defaultPrompt: Turn this article into a WeChat cover image
Make these notes into a social card set
Turn my WeChat Reading highlights and thoughts into a sourced card set
Make my WeChat Reading statistics into a monthly reading report
Draw this argument as a whiteboard card
Compress the key sections of this article into formula cards
